text: Thank you for traveling with us.
text_joined: Thank you for traveling with us.

text:
You who seek wealth will begin your journey
in the verdant forests of the Woodlands.

There, you will cross paths with
Herminia, "the Covetous Witch."

Her all-consuming desire has stained
the town of Valore with darkness and depravity.
text_joined:

Herminia, "the Covetous Witch."

Her all-consuming desire has stained
the town of Valore with darkness and depravity.

text:
You who seek fame will begin your journey
in the grassy meadows of the Flatlands.

There, you will cross paths with
Auguste, the genius playwright.

In Theatropolis, city of the arts, many a poor soul
has been led astray by his beguiling words.
text_joined:

text:
You who seek power will begin your journey
in the snow-swept frontiers of the Frostlands.

There, you will cross paths with
Tytos, the hero.

Leader of the Scarlet Wings, a band of former
criminals, he rules Emberglow with an iron fist.
